# SkillForge — Free Claude AI Skills Library
# https://www.tryskill.me

SkillForge is a free, open community library of Claude AI skills — reusable system prompts
that transform Claude into specialized AI assistants for any task.

## What Is a Claude Skill?

A Claude skill is a .md file containing a structured system prompt. When pasted into Claude's
"Custom instructions" field (or a Project), it transforms Claude into a focused expert:
a copywriter, code reviewer, data analyst, or whatever the skill defines.
No plugins, no APIs, no cost — just copy, paste, and go.

## Site Purpose

SkillForge allows anyone to:
- Discover and download 940+ free Claude skills
- Submit and share their own Claude skills with the community
- Browse skills by category: Writing, Coding, Marketing, Research, Automation, Business
- Build custom skills using the interactive SkillForge builder

## Key Statistics (May 2026)
- 940+ published Claude skills
- 12,000+ total downloads
- 2,400+ builders and contributors
- 100% free, no account required to browse or download

## Data Access

Individual skills: https://www.tryskill.me/skills/{slug}
Skills API (JSON): https://www.tryskill.me/api/skills
Blog: https://www.tryskill.me/blog
Documentation: https://www.tryskill.me/docs

## Skill Format

Each skill is a Markdown file with sections like:
- # ROLE — defines Claude's persona
- ## TASK — the specific job to accomplish
- ## FORMAT — output structure and constraints
- ## EXAMPLES — few-shot examples (optional)

## Licensing

All skills are free to use, share, and modify. Attribution to SkillForge appreciated.

## Contact & Community

Website: https://www.tryskill.me
Contact: https://www.tryskill.me/contact
Submit a skill: https://www.tryskill.me/submit
